rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Banned words — grep zero-tolerance.
Ritual / practice (as noun) / ceremony — hard ban.
No stale markers, no 'fixed' retrospectives, no session biography.
Register match — Bootstrap voice trio (Godin × Sutherland × Siilasmaa).
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 25|the human moves one level up; line 71|That is not an AI policy slide. That is operational judgment.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Credit the original when paraphrasing a named technique.
Training creator's name banned in student-facing body.
Author-'we' ban — first-person-plural extension.
Over-hedge detector.
Punchy framing keeps its punch; carve-out lives downstream.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 25|the human moves one level up — followed by unpacking not softening

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Value-prop / positioning framing belongs in sales copy + project-level strategy docs, NOT in student-facing curriculum body.
rules_evaluated.evidence: lines 73-77|can Claude write the mail? / have you designed the loop? — operational teaching, not positioning defense

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Watch out for planting jargon too early.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 47|steering eval earned immediately at line 49; judge/eval at M5/M6 level
line 31|allow your agent — peer-flat, not combative

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Aspirational destination, never corrective gap.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 25|the human moves one level up — aspirational, not corrective

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Earn every technical term on first use.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 49|steering eval defined at line 49; agent/loop/judge earned in M1-M5

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Business-audience word ban.
Memory vs context — use deliberately.
No em-dashes. Simple sentences.
Section headers use command verbs when the section is about doing something.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 79|Make the goal-nudger — verb-led; line 59|The human does not disappear — declarative, lecture-style (correct for concept sections)

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: LLM-vs-agent-vs-Claude vocabulary discipline.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 31|your agent (acting); line 83|Ask Claude (addressee); clean vocabulary throughout

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No time-of-day anchors in body prose.
Reflection beats stay invisible in the flow.
`.md` is the default file type for student artifacts.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 113|./goal-nudger-eval.md — correct extension

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No placeholders inside fenced blocks.
rules_evaluated.evidence: lines 87-114|no [BRACKETS]; open-ended student input in conversation (correct)

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Every prompt block gets a one-sentence action lead-in.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 83|Ask Claude to build it with you:

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Canonical presentation shape — lead-in, label with destination, blank line, fenced block.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 83 lead-in; line 85 label; line 86 blank; lines 87-114 fence

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Citation discipline.
rules_evaluated.evidence: no citations in prompt

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Question-dump default — `in turn` is too soft for one-at-a-time rhythm.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 93|ask me one question at a time, wait for my answer, and do not show the list

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Grill before save.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 113|Show me what you wrote and ask for one final correction before saving

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Artifact destinations are explicit subpaths (Bootstrap-specific).
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 113|./goal-nudger-eval.md — explicit root path

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Mood contract named.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 25|the human moves one level up; line 67-70|human designs loop; lines 124-128|system earns autonomy — Module 6 empowered-builder mood honored

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Epistemic mood ≠ punitive mood.
rules_evaluated.evidence: no shame or failure framing; competence-and-design focus

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Lead with the discipline, not the failure mode.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 25|the new human role (discipline) not error-catching (failure)

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Strategy-fidelity check.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 140 maintainer|M6 loop designer arc — consistent with M1-M5 arc recap
